top_risk: Agent-runtime false success reporting — tasks report completion before writing artifacts (T-1003), compounded by timeout-induced unknown states (T-1005). Both undermine core reliability guarantees.
recommended_actions: Gate task completion on verified artifact existence — do not report success until output file is confirmed written and non-empty (T-1003).
Implement deterministic timeout handling with well-defined terminal states and automatic retry (T-1005).
Resolve intermittent payment processing failure for premium-tier customers, addressing revenue impact (T-1006).
